Content: Letter number (5071C, 5747C, 6331C, 4883C) | Control number from letter | SSN and date of birth | Current mailing address | One financial account (last 4 digits) | Prior year return info

1. NEVER process without full ID verification | 2. Access ID Verify via SERP | 3. Ask knowledge-based questions | 4. Document all responses in AMS | 5. If fails 2x require in-person visit | 6. Issue 5747C if online unavailable

Props.Title: Red Flags
Props.Body: Unable to answer basic questions | Background noise (call center) | Rushing agent | Address change after verification | Multiple failed attempts same day

Props.Title: Required Fields
Props.Body: Letter and control number | All KBA responses (pass/fail) | Caller relationship to taxpayer | Third-party authorization (2848/8821)
